items.docs: Returns all currency symbols Fixer supports along with their full names.

params.name: base
params.description:
Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

items.docs:
Returns the most recent exchange rate data. Rates update hourly on the Free and
Basic tiers, every 10 minutes on Professional, and every 60 seconds on
Professional Plus and Enterprise.

params.name: date
params.description: ISO-8601 date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format (any working day since 1999-01-04).

params.name: base
params.description:
Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

items.docs:
Returns end-of-day historical exchange rates for any date since 1999. Historical
data is available on all plans, including Free.

params.name: date
params.description: Optional historical date (YYYY-MM-DD) to use for the conversion rate.

items.docs:
Converts an amount from one currency to another using real-time or historical
rates. Available on Basic plan and above.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date for the time series window (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date for the time series window (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: base
params.description:
Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

items.docs:
Returns daily historical exchange rates between two dates of your choice,
with a maximum range of 365 days. Available on Professional plan and above.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date for the fluctuation window (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date for the fluctuation window (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: base
params.description:
Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

items.docs:
Returns fluctuation data (start rate, end rate, change, change_pct) between two
dates for any supported currency pair. Available on Professional Plus and above.
